issue_title: [CON-001] Bootstrap @optcg/types from the canonical contract bundle
rendered_issue_body:
<!-- Generated by tools/spec_board_sync.ts from the approved story file. -->

_This issue is a synchronized projection of the approved story. Edit the story file, then rerun the sync tool instead of hand-editing authoritative sections here._

## Summary
Create the initial shared types package from the canonical contract so the unambiguous foundation contracts have one compile-checked, boundary-enforced source of truth without freezing unresolved spectator or protocol shapes.

**Story ID:** `CON-001`  
**Spec Version:** `v6`  
**Type:** `implementation`  
**Area:** `contracts`  
**Priority:** `critical`  
**Status:** `approved`

## Authoritative Spec References
- 15-implementation-kickoff.s002 (v5 kickoff gates)
- 15-implementation-kickoff.s005 (Step 1 - `@optcg/types`)
- 22-v6-implementation-tightening.s006 (2. TypeScript model)
- 01-system-architecture.s004 (`@optcg/types`)

## Scope
- create packages/types seeded from contracts/canonical-types.ts
- export the canonical foundation contracts that are already concretely specified in the current contract/spec set, including branded ids, Action, PendingDecision, PlayerView, replay/card-manifest types, and card metadata interfaces
- make @optcg/types a real built workspace package with a package-local entrypoint and declaration surface
- keep the package free of runtime dependencies on engine, database, websocket, browser, or sibling workspace code
- wire contract drift, build-layout, and package-boundary checks into repo verification

## Out of Scope
- finalizing public protocol DTOs such as ClientActionEnvelope, ServerMessage, or filtered PublicDecision payloads
- defining or freezing SpectatorView shape or spectator-mode-specific payloads
- finalizing deck-validation input/output DTOs
- full engine behavior
- match-server transport handling
- browser view helpers

## Dependencies
- INF-001 (#17)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] packages/types builds as a consumable workspace package with a package-local JS and declaration entrypoint
- [ ] packages/types exports the foundation contract surface required to start downstream work without inventing unresolved spectator or protocol DTOs
- [ ] the canonical contract compiles through the repo toolchain without undefined symbols
- [ ] contract drift, stale build output, and package-boundary regressions fail verification

## Required Tests
- contract compile and package-build check covering contracts/canonical-types.ts and packages/types through the repo toolchain
- import-boundary regression proving sibling package and app imports are not pulled into packages/types
- API-surface regression covering the narrowed foundation exports only

## Repo Rules
- must pass pnpm verify
- must preserve package boundary enforcement
- must not introduce hidden-information leakage

## Ambiguity Policy
fail_and_escalate
